questions.question: Find the magnitude of a vector with components (3,4) and (−2,−5). Express your answer in terms of √. (8 hours)
questions.hint: Use the properties of vector addition and the distance formula.

questions.question: A particle moves along a straight line with a position vector given by (t^2, t) at time t. Find the velocity vector of the particle when t = 2. (8 hours)
questions.hint: Differentiate the position vector with respect to time.

questions.question: If θ is the angle between two vectors A = (2, 3) and B = (4, -1), find the value of cos θ. Express your answer as a decimal to 3 significant figures. (8 hours)
questions.hint: Use the formula for the cosine of the angle between two vectors.
